comment: Exhibit A trade templates (ADR-0003, SC-S3b Exhibit A). Article I (General) + Article III/IV/V/VI are the FIXED skeleton (skeleton.md, tokenized preamble); Article II 'The Work' is trade-templated — the operator picks a trade, gets that trade's standard Art II as an editable starting point (pre-fills exhibit_a_work_text), and refines it. Art II bodies are VERBATIM from the 05_Subcontracts corpus per-trade templates (Kendall 2025.112 / Steger 2025.364, canonical + project-identical); AC/MV/DC Electrical share the detailed electrical scope (the corpus does not distinguish them at template level); Specialty has no corpus template (operator-authored). Skeleton + version files are sha256-pinned + immutable — a wording change is a NEW version, never an edit.
